title: alnus viridis var. minor
intro: Alnus viridis var. minor, also known as green alder or small green alder, is a variety of green alder, a deciduous shrub or small tree native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be attributed to its rich content of salicylic acid, a compound similar to aspirin. The health benefits of Alnus viridis var. minor include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to act as an antiseptic and a diuretic. Herbal preparations of Alnus viridis var. minor include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions.
